So the left side has blue on top and red in the middle, while the right side has red on top and blue on bottom. Maybe the goal is to swap the positions of the red and blue objects on the left side to match the right side's order.
But I don't know how to swap objects on the left side. The only interaction I've found is clicking on targets/fills to collect/return colors.

So collecting a color moves it to a new position and leaves a checkered pattern at the original position.
When I return a color (by clicking on the fill):
- Color moves back to original position
- Checkered pattern moves to where the color was
So it's a swap between the color and the checkered pattern.
Now, the question is: what's the goal? Maybe the goal is to have the checkered patterns in specific positions, or to have the colors in specific positions.
